evidence_quotes.quote: This game industry has become one of the biggest scams of 2025.

paragraphs.text: This game industry has become one of the biggest scams of 2025. These publishers have realized that they can just call the game an "early beta release" so they can justify releasing a broken, unplayable product and then slowly forget about it and remove it entirely scamming everyone in the process. This is a highly profitable, half a trillion dollar industry according to statista.com. Because of the nature of videogames not being taken seriously, this industry has remained highly unregulated and companies have taken advantage of this. For a lot of people, these products are highly beloved pieces of art that we want to own and preserve. We need to start acting accordingly
